## Identity

Ormund's posthumous son, gen-5, born after the Salt Debt Massacre had
already made him fatherless and attainted in the same season. Named after
his great-great-grandfather Quor, for lack of any better idea.

## Quotes

> "He never knew his father owed anyone anything. That may be the only
> mercy in this whole account."

— the maester attending Tomm's birth, `sources/chapters/asalt-tomm-01.md:3`

> "They tell me I am named for a man four graves deep. I have decided to
> take it as a compliment and not think too hard about the graves."

— Tomm Quorwyn, grown, `sources/chapters/asalt-tomm-02.md:61`
